name: ui-mockup
description: Create and edit UI Mockup/Wireframe from System Design Document — 8 commands: ASCII wireframes + HTML mockups (Web Component master page), component specs, design tokens, CLAUDE.md-aware alert library (SweetAlert2 default), framework-aware URL syntax, split-aware design-doc reading (schema 2.3.0 registry), qa-ui-test factor-hint integration (auto-derive complexity_factors/risk_baseline/acceptance_criteria_ids → seeds qa-create-scenario), validation, mode-based /help. Integrates with system-design-doc, frontend-design, qa-ui-test, brain. See README for changelog.
